---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a public-facing improvement to Stream
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

What should be improved?

## User outcome

What can a reader, contributor, or user do better after this exists?

## Area

- README / repo posture
- Dashboard UX
- API surface
- Data explanation
- Research framing
- Contributor experience
- Other

## Proposal

Describe the change clearly.

## Boundaries

Confirm this does **not** require exposing proprietary Loopchii systems:

- [ ] This proposal stays within the public repo boundary
- [ ] This proposal improves clarity, usefulness, trust, or reproducibility

## Extra context

Links, examples, screenshots, or references.
